S.FORM: I 1956 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 20 a romi'ad masofoc ci Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Mauritania anini i ci Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz, patirengan a romi'ad i 2009 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 5 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i mo~uńßam…ô…¨~…ģ o~uo~u~u…ĺ…¨~…ģ ab~b~v…¨~…ģ…ô…ĺ a*i* , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u mao~u~uritania anini i ¶i mo~uńßam…ô…¨~…ģ o~uo~u~u…ĺ…¨~…ģ ab~b~v…¨~…ģ…ô…ĺ a*i*, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1956 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 20 a romi'ad masofoc ci Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Mauritania anini i ci Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz, patirengan a romi'ad i 2009 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 5 a romi'ad.
